posts.author: p8aggie (Lance Pate)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello monday.com experts!

I’m in charge of the marketing operations for a strong startup. We are hiring for a project manager that is an expert with monday.com. Here is a link to the job description. Our headquarters are in California but we are a remote group so you are free to work from home. If you are interested you can message me here with a reply to start the process. Looking forward to hearing from the gurus.
